sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5031" key="a)mblunth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμβλ-υντήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n5031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing dimness of sight,</tr_> in pl., Poet. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
